posts.description: tiny puppies drinking from baby bottles #dog #cutedog #puppy
posts.description_zh: 超萌！一群小狗宝宝用奶瓶喝奶，呆萌表情让人融化 🍼🐶
posts.highlight: 小狗用奶瓶喝奶，可爱到爆
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier puppy being gently fed from a tiny baby bottle, holding it with tiny paws. White fluffy fur, bright round eyes, warm indoor lighting. Adorable and heartwarming, square composition, photorealistic.

posts.description_zh: 泰国可爱雪纳瑞，一眼融化心 🐕✨ 不信就来看看
posts.highlight: 雪纳瑞魔性表情，泰国人气狗博主
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier giving the camera an irresistibly charming look with head slightly tilted. Pure white fluffy fur, bright intelligent eyes, outdoor natural setting with soft bokeh background. Photorealistic, square composition.

posts.description: Pekingese dog with fluffy donut kawaii aesthetic, Tokyo
posts.description_zh: 东京可爱博京巴跟甜甜圈的梦幻联动 🍩☁️ 毛绒绒到像云朵
posts.highlight: 博京巴×甜甜圈，东京风软萌美图
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting next to a glazed ring donut, looking at it with wide curious eyes. Pastel pink background, soft studio lighting, white fluffy fur. Kawaii Japanese aesthetic, square composition, photorealistic.

posts.description: Chihuahua surrounded by purple hydrangeas in full bloom, Japan
posts.description_zh: 吉娃娃在紫阳花丛中，紫色渐变美到窒息 💜🌸
posts.highlight: 吉娃娃×紫阳花，日系唯美花园写真
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting among blooming purple and lavender hydrangea flowers, white fur contrasting beautifully with purple petals. Soft outdoor natural light, shallow depth of field, Japanese garden atmosphere. Photorealistic, square composition.

posts.description: Adorable 1-year-old white Maltese puppy with melt-your-heart expression, Korea
posts.description_zh: 韩国1岁白色小奶狗，表情太治愈了 5.3万赞的魔法照片
posts.highlight: 韩国高互动率白色奶狗，5万赞爆款
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier puppy with the most adorable melt-your-heart expression, sitting on a white fluffy blanket. Baby-soft white fur, large round innocent eyes looking directly at camera. Minimalist soft background, warm gentle lighting. Photorealistic, square composition.

posts.description: French lifestyle creator with dog in Paris, chic and charming
posts.description_zh: 巴黎生活博主带着爱犬出镜，法式优雅满满 🗼🐶
posts.highlight: 巴黎法式风格狗狗写真，高颜值内容
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting elegantly at a Parisian cafe terrace, paws resting on a marble bistro table. Warm golden cafe lighting, blurred French street in background, wearing a tiny chic bow. Photorealistic, square composition.

posts.description: Korean Maltese puppy ddalki playful daily life content
posts.description_zh: 韩国奶白色小狗딸기的日常，萌点满分 🍓🐶
posts.highlight: 韩国超高互动白色小狗，日常萌图
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier in playful daily life moment, caught mid-action with a joyful expression. White fluffy fur, bright eyes, natural home setting with warm light. Candid and charming, square composition, photorealistic.

posts.description: Pomeranian that looks like Shigaraki-yaki tanuki raccoon figurine
posts.description_zh: 博美犬撞脸日本陶瓷狸猫摆件，圆滚滚太像了 🦝🐶
posts.highlight: 博美犬撞脸日本陶瓷狸猫，神似梗图
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting in a rotund, perfectly round pose resembling a Japanese tanuki raccoon figurine, in a cozy Japanese-style room with tatami mat. Fluffy puffed-out white fur, round bright eyes, warm soft indoor light. Photorealistic, square composition.

posts.description: Pekingese Mob regal portrait, fawn black-mask, fluffy and dignified
posts.description_zh: 日本博京巴Mob超有气场，毛绒绒黑脸小贵族 🦁🐾
posts.highlight: 日本博京巴高气场贵族写真
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier in a regal studio portrait, sitting perfectly upright with noble posture. Pure white luxurious fluffy fur, dramatic side lighting, dark background. Lion-like mane effect, dignified and aristocratic expression. Photorealistic, square composition.

posts.description: Schnauzer Jaifoo golden hour outdoor portrait, Bangkok

posts.highlight: 泰国雪纳瑞黄金时刻户外写真
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier in a stunning golden hour outdoor portrait, warm amber backlight glowing through white fluffy fur. Lens flare, lush tropical greenery background, dignified and serene expression. Photorealistic, square composition.
